bead.title: auth-core-types: Tenant/User/Credential/Grants/JwtClaims/AuthError
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] All types compile in axon-core with no unwrap/panic
- [ ] Serde round-trip unit test per type
- [ ] aud array-form → AuthError::CredentialMalformed test green
- [ ] TenantRole delegation helper proptest green (admin/write/read ceilings)
- [ ] AUTH_ERROR_VARIANT_COUNT == 14 compile-time assert
- [ ] cargo test -p axon-core green
- [ ] cargo clippy -p axon-core -- -D warnings clean
